text:
進撃st20130629巨人 is the 8th track on the "Attack on Titan" Original Soundtrack II. It is also the 6th track on disc 2 of the "Attack on Titan" Season 2 Original Soundtrack.

As with all the other pre-The Final Season OSTs, it was composed and arranged by .

Title

st – String instruments

Musical motifs

The is split into 2 parts. The first part (0:00-2:49), which is remixed in the track son2seaVer (3:24-5:20), and the second part (2:50-5:25).
